name: The Cooking Class
developer: Another Dev Company, The Handsome Mesh
short_description: Come Cook With Us! Let's learn together how to cook delicious meals for you and your family. Because remember, can't live with an empty belly! Find the right VHS scattered around the house through a random system of placement in order to find the code to escape the house. Good Luck!
detailed_description:
Come Cook With Us

Welcome to the Dupont Family. A nice, quiet household in the Nova Scotia, Canada. Let's learn together how to cook delicious meals for you and your family. Because remember, can't live with an empty belly!
Find the VHS scattered around the house through a random system of placement in order to find the code to escape the house.
The first of a scheduled trilogy of games involving the Dupont Family, The Cooking Class is an homage to VHS found footage horror, 80's and 90's slasher movies, and the story of a family and its legacy and connections.
A first person atmospheric game, where the players will have to find their way out.

There are many hidden subplots and side stories that will be revealed through alternate channels and game sequels. There is an alive, vibrant world behind The Cooking Class, with a featured Youtube Channel, an Instagram page and much more to come.

supported_languages:
English*, Italian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
